subcodes.title: Words spoken en route in carriage in Akka, 1915-04-17
subcodes.first_line: Doest thou see the farmers furrowing the fields for the sowing of new seeds? Are they not working with tireless exertion?
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @words vs deeds, @effort; striving
